Our Mission

Empowering
Transformation

Our mission is to empower organizations throughout every phase of their digital transformation journey with expertise, transparency, and unwavering commitment. We deliver tailored IT services designed to enhance operational efficiency, reinforce cybersecurity, and drive sustainable business growth.


By taking the time to understand each client's unique objectives and technological challenges, we develop strategic solutions that address immediate business needs while building a strong foundation for future scalability and innovation.

Our Vision

A Smarter
Digital Future

BTGT Services envisions becoming a leading force in driving digital transformation for businesses across diverse industries. Our vision is to create a future where organizations can embrace technology seamlessly — empowering them to innovate, scale, and operate with confidence.


Through continuous innovation and adaptation to emerging technologies, we strive to build enduring partnerships founded on trust, reliability, and shared success — shaping a smarter, more connected, and resilient digital future for businesses worldwide.

What We Do

Our Solutions

Scalable frontend and backend solutions designed with security, performance, and reliability at the core.

01
Fintech Software Development

Empower your business with robust and secure fintech solutions engineered for performance and scalability. Our expertise spans modern financial architectures, complex API ecosystems, low-latency trading infrastructures, compliance-driven development, and advanced cybersecurity implementations.

02
Blockchain Data Analysis

Transform blockchain data into actionable intelligence with our comprehensive analytics expertise. On-chain data aggregation, cross-chain indexing, advanced pattern analysis, anomaly detection, smart contract activity monitoring, and tailored dashboard solutions for real-time strategic decision-making.

Proven Results

Featured Solutions

Trading Systems
Institutional-Grade HFT Infrastructure
80%+
Reduction in execution latency

In today's ultra-competitive High-Frequency Trading (HFT) landscape, every microsecond matters. BTGT Services partnered with a leading asset management firm to architect and deliver a fully customized, institutional-grade trading infrastructure optimized for speed, scalability, and resilience.


The platform combined advanced Complex Event Processing (CEP) capabilities with Direct Market Access (DMA) connectivity, leveraging ultra-low-latency core services developed in Rust alongside a flexible Python framework for rapid strategy development and execution.


By unifying high-performance system architecture with agile trading workflows, the solution achieved more than an 80% reduction in execution latency, enhanced trade execution efficiency, and maintained exceptional stability during periods of intense market activity and volatility.

Blockchain Security
DeFi Security Analytics Platform
RT
Real-time threat detection

BTGT Services collaborated with a prominent decentralized finance platform to strengthen its security posture against emerging on-chain threats, including exploit-driven attacks and malicious liquidity schemes.


We engineered a scalable blockchain intelligence platform capable of processing and analyzing high-volume transactional data in real time. The solution leveraged custom indexing pipelines, high-performance node infrastructure, and graph-based analytics to uncover hidden wallet interactions and suspicious behavioral patterns.


Advanced detection models identified irregular transaction flows, coordinated exploit activities, and anomalous smart contract behaviors. A centralized monitoring dashboard provided live alerts, investigative tools, and actionable risk indicators — enabling security teams to respond rapidly and reduce protocol exposure.
